name: Create personal npm repositories in Artifactory
name_cn: 在 Artifactory 中创建个人 npm 仓库

name: Complete npm build and publish Build Info
name_cn: 完成 npm 构建并发布 Build Info
hint: cd modules/xray-npm/sample-project, configure npm to use your virtual repo, run: jf npm install --build-name=<NICKNAME>-xray-npm-build --build-number=1, then: jf rt build-publish <NICKNAME>-xray-npm-build 1
hint_cn: 进入 modules/xray-npm/sample-project，配置 npm 指向虚拟仓库，运行构建命令后发布 Build Info

name: Create an Xray Security Policy
name_cn: 创建 Xray 安全策略
hint: In JFrog UI: Xray → Policies → New Policy (type: Security, name must contain your nickname, add a rule for High/Critical CVEs)
hint_cn: 在 JFrog UI 中：Xray → Policies → New Policy（类型选 Security，名称必须包含昵称，添加高危/严重 CVE 规则）

name: Create an Xray Watch targeting your build
name_cn: 创建 Xray Watch 监控你的构建
hint: In JFrog UI: Xray → Watches → New Watch (name must contain your nickname, add your npm repos or build as resource, attach your policy)
hint_cn: 在 JFrog UI 中：Xray → Watches → New Watch（名称必须包含昵称，添加 npm 仓库或构建为资源，关联你的策略）

name: Trigger Xray scan and explore CVE results
name_cn: 触发 Xray 扫描并查看 CVE 结果
hint: In JFrog UI: Xray → Scans List or Artifactory → Builds → <NICKNAME>-xray-npm-build → click the build to view Xray violations and CVE details
hint_cn: 在 JFrog UI 中：Xray → Scans List 或 Artifactory → Builds → 点击构建查看 Xray 安全违规与 CVE 详情
